parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: $json.primary_actor,
  messages: [{
    role: 'user',
    content: [
      'You are processing a forwarded regulatory affairs email.',
      'Original subject: ' + $json.original_subject,
      'Original from: ' + $json.original_from,
      'Matching key: ' + $json.matching_key,
      'Body excerpt: ' + $json.body_excerpt,
      $json.warm_start_context || '',
      '',
      'Analyze this case and return ONLY a JSON object with these fields:',
      '  actor: which RA agent handles this (ra_us, ra_eu, or ra_kr based on region)',
      '  wp: work package ID if matched (e.g. WP-123), or null if new',
      '  match: \"existing\" if wp found, \"new\" if not',
      '  confidence: 0.0-1.0 confidence score',
      '  region: primary region (US, EU, KR)',
      '  comment: brief analysis comment',
      '  transition_proposed: status transition if any, or null',
      '',
      'Return ONLY the JSON object, no other text.'
    ].join('\\n')
  }]
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $now.toFormat("yyyyMMddHHmmssSSS") + "-" + $json.analysis.actor, peers: { [$json.analysis.actor]: {} }, metadata: { type: "mail_triage_session", actor: $json.analysis.actor } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ messages: [{ content: JSON.stringify($node['Honcho 기록 준비'].json.activity_record), peer_id: $node['Honcho 기록 준비'].json.analysis.actor, metadata: { type: 'activity_log', record_type: 'matched' } }] }) }}
